What We Do

Our Core
Services

With over 15 years of hands-on experience, Ganesh Enterprises specializes in industrial phosphating — Zinc and Manganese — as its core service, supported by Blackening (bulk orders) and Pickling. Trusted by automotive and engineering manufacturers for consistent quality and high-volume output.

01
Core Service
Phosphating — Type A
Zinc Phosphating

Fine-grained zinc phosphate coating offering excellent adhesion for paint and powder coating systems. Ideal for automotive body parts, sheet metal, and components requiring paint base preparation. Delivers uniform grey surface finish with reliable corrosion protection.

01
Core Service
Phosphating — Type B
Manganese Phosphating

Heavy, coarse-crystalline black coating providing maximum corrosion and wear resistance. Used on engine components, gears, clutch plates, and high-load parts. The coating acts as an oil-retention layer — ideal for components operating under high friction and stress.

02
Blackening
Bulk Orders Only

Chemical black oxide treatment that imparts a uniform, matte-black finish to steel components. Enhances corrosion resistance, reduces light reflection, and delivers a clean industrial aesthetic. Available exclusively for bulk production orders — ideal for automotive tooling, fasteners, and precision engineering parts.

03
Pickling

Controlled acid pickling process that removes rust, mill scale, heat tint, and oxide layers from metal surfaces. Restores a clean, reactive base metal surface ready for phosphating, coating, or further processing. An essential pre-treatment stage for quality surface preparation and long-term coating performance.

How We Work

Treatment Process

01
Degreasing

Alkaline cleaning removes oils, grease, and organic contaminants from all metal surfaces

02
Water Rinse

Thorough rinse eliminates all cleaning agents before subsequent process stages

03
Acid Pickling

Removal of rust, mill scale, and oxide layers for a clean, reactive metal surface

04
Phosphating

Application of grey, black, or custom phosphate coating to exact specification

05
Final Finish

Post-treatment oiling or sealing for enhanced corrosion protection before dispatch

About Us

Built on 15+ Years
of Expertise

Ganesh Enterprises is a trusted name in industrial metal surface treatment, founded and led by Vipin Singh with over 15 years of hands-on expertise in phosphating technology and precision process management.

We serve automotive manufacturers and industrial parts suppliers who demand consistent coating quality, reliable turnaround, and process compliance. Our plant handles high-volume batch production with strict quality checks at every stage.

From single-component samples to large production runs — we deliver surface treatment that meets the toughest industrial standards.

⚙
High-volume batch phosphating capability
🔬
Strict quality control at every process stage
⚡
Fast, reliable turnaround for all batch sizes
🤝
Long-term vendor partnerships with manufacturers
Production Batch — Precision Phosphating
Why Choose Us

What Sets Us Apart

When you're evaluating phosphating vendors, here's why Ganesh Enterprises is the right choice for your production line.

15+
Years of Experience

Over 15 years of hands-on phosphating expertise. We've processed thousands of batches for automotive and engineering clients — consistency is built into our process.

2-IN-1
Zinc & Manganese

Both Zinc and Manganese phosphating under one roof. No need to split your orders between vendors — we handle both finishes with the same quality standard.

BULK
High Volume Capacity

Built for high-volume production runs. Our plant handles large batches efficiently — ideal for Tier-1 and Tier-2 automotive suppliers with regular, recurring requirements.

FAST
Quick Turnaround

We understand production deadlines. Fast processing and dispatch cycles mean your components are back on your line without delay — keeping your schedule on track.

GST
Fully Compliant

GST registered and MSME certified. All transactions are fully documented with proper invoicing — making vendor compliance and audits completely hassle-free for your accounts team.

NCR
Faridabad Based

Strategically located in Faridabad's industrial belt — close to major automotive clusters in Delhi NCR. Lower logistics cost and faster pickup/delivery for local manufacturers.
